protocol.mechanism: relative directional-change event clocks as price/flow impact elasticity
protocol.flow_path: cumulative signed taker quote flow divided by prior completed 1h quote volume
protocol.dc_threshold: frozen at each online state transition from prior-only one-hour path scale
protocol.hourly_decision: bar open timestamp minute 55 is completed at next hour; signal enters next row open
protocol.design_history: more flexible pre-2024 quantile-tail, onset and recoupling probes were weak; final architect-reviewed 18-policy impact-elasticity grid is recorded, and all such semantics are contaminated/frozen
protocol.contamination_note: 2023 is inspected internal selection; 2024+ remained sealed
